# Antigravity SEO

> Antigravity-first SEO skill suite for technical SEO, content quality, schema, Core Web Vitals, GEO/AEO, local SEO, maps, backlinks, DataForSEO, Google APIs, Firecrawl, and Gemini image workflows.

## Project

- Repository: https://github.com/dotusmanali/antigravity-seo
- License: MIT
- Current version: 1.9.6+antigravity.1
- Canonical skill entrypoint: skills/seo/SKILL.md
- Plugin manifest: .gemini-plugin/plugin.json
- Credits: CREDITS.md
- Initial Antigravity SEO conversion: https://github.com/avalonreset

## Install

- Private preview: `gh repo clone Muhammad Usman Ali/antigravity-seo && cd antigravity-seo && bash install.sh`
- Future public install: `curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotusmanali/antigravity-seo/main/install.sh | bash`
- Windows private preview: `gh repo clone Muhammad Usman Ali/antigravity-seo; cd antigravity-seo; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\install.ps1`

## Core Docs

- README.md
- CREDITS.md
- docs/COMMANDS.md
- docs/INSTALLATION.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/MCP-INTEGRATION.md
- docs/API-READINESS-MATRIX.md
- docs/DEMO-RUNBOOK.md
- docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md

## Runtime Notes

- New config path: `~/.config/antigravity-seo/`
- New cache path: `~/.cache/antigravity-seo/`
- Project cache path: `.seo-cache/`
- Credentials must stay outside the repository.
- Optional live-data providers return setup-required states when credentials or MCP servers are unavailable.

## Common Prompts

- `Do a full SEO check on https://example.com following best practices.`
- `/seo audit https://example.com`
- `/seo technical https://example.com`
- `/seo schema https://example.com`
- `/seo dataforseo serp "seo tools"`
